title: Notifications  - Device updating OFF
scenario: No DFU notification appears when device firmware is outdated and "Device Software Update" notification is disabled in app settings while app is in background.
steps: 1. Ensure the device has a firmware version lower than the current server version.
2. Go to App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Turn OFF the 'Device Software Update' notification.
4. Send the app to the background.
5. Initiate a DFU (Device Firmware Update) process on the device.
expected: No notification should pop up when the DFU process begins while the app is in the background.
